TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjusinlung ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 89 buwan, 264 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 259 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Bunun 2%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjusinlung hya' ga Kacedas. tay mkyahu' na Tjusinlung hya' ga Qaljecim. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjus~ɕinluŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjus~ɕinluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kaʦ~ʨe*as~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tjus~ɕinluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa qaljeʦ~ʨim. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tjusinlung ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 89 buwan, 264 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 259 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Bunun 2%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjusinlung hya' ga Kacedas. tay mkyahu' na Tjusinlung hya' ga Qaljecim. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjus~ɕinluŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjus~ɕinluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kaʦ~ʨe*as~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tjus~ɕinluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa qaljeʦ~ʨim. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
